$comment: Region -> just-in-time delivery register (tempdoc 620 Move 2). Promotes scripts/agent-analytics/lib/governed-regions.mjs into data, the promotion that file's predecessor anticipated ('promote to governance/consult-register.v1.json only if it grows'). Consumed by consult-doc-hint.mjs (PreToolUse 'Consult' -> pushes governing docs when a region is edited) and maintain-doc-hint.mjs (Stop 'Maintain' -> blocks once if a region's governing doc went un-updated). Schema per row: pathIncludes (array of path substrings; matches if the edited path contains any) + region (label) + docs ([{path, why}] surfaced by consult) + maintain (optional bool; when true, maintain-doc-hint blocks turn-end if none of the docs were updated this session. Omit for consult-only DELIVERY rows that push a doc to read without demanding you maintain it -- e.g. the 616 read-0x architecture docs) + recipe (optional array of step strings; surfaced by consult as a numbered just-in-time procedure -- the relocation home for path-triggerable workflow recipes evicted from the always-loaded layer, e.g. common-workflows.md's gRPC/REST/config/agent-tool recipes, tempdoc 620 Phase 2; a recipe row typically sets docs:[] so it never blocks at Stop). A delivery row is how the always-loaded layer evicts region-specific context: load it only when the region is touched.

docs.why: the frontend is **Lit web components**, not React (the React stack is retired).
single presentation authorities (tone/originator/layout/modality); a re-authored badge/modal/transient is meant to be unrepresentable, not just discouraged.

regions.region: the loopback egress / inbound-access security surface

docs.why: the privacy guarantee ('nothing leaves your machine') and its mechanical anchors (CSP loopback-lock, Host/Origin/token filters, no telemetry) — re-verify the threat model if you change the CSP or the request-filter security plumbing.
the agent loop, operation-substrate tool dispatch, token budget, durability, and the MCP tool surface -- read before changing agent behavior (616 read-0x delivery).
HNSW search, SPLADE learned-sparse retrieval, hybrid fusion, and the commit-metadata system -- the ranking-quality surface (616 read-0x delivery).
how the Worker builds ORT sessions and wires the six encoder roles onto one typed composition pipeline (616 read-0x delivery).

recipe: Define the method + messages in the .proto (e.g. indexing.proto).
Implement the service method in modules/worker-services/.
Add the forward in DelegatingIngestService.java (modules/indexer-worker/.../grpc/) — the server registers this wrapper, not the impl; without it the RPC returns UNIMPLEMENTED at runtime.
Add the client call in modules/app-services/ (RemoteKnowledgeClient or the relevant client).
Add a contract test.
Verify: ./gradlew.bat :modules:ipc-common:build :modules:worker-services:test :modules:indexer-worker:test
Full reference: docs/reference/contributing/common-workflows.md (Add a gRPC method).
Add the handler/controller under modules/ui/src/main/java/.../api/.
Register the route via the relevant .../api/routes/*Routes.java class, then wire that route class from LocalApiServer.java if needed.
Update docs/reference/api-contract-map.md if the endpoint is public.
Honor the Hard Invariants: loopback-only bind (127.0.0.1), no legacy endpoints (/api/search, /api/settings), and Head never touches Lucene — delegate index IO to the Worker via gRPC.
Verify: ./gradlew.bat :modules:ui:test
Full reference: docs/reference/contributing/common-workflows.md (Add a REST endpoint).
Add the entry in EnvRegistry.java (operator-facing) or ConfigKey.java (YAML-only).
Wire it in ResolvedConfigBuilder.java — add a putYaml*() contribution + a resolve*() call in the relevant build*().
Expose it via a ResolvedConfig record field.
Document it in docs/reference/configuration/environment-variables.md.
Verify: ./gradlew.bat :modules:configuration:test
Full reference: docs/reference/contributing/common-workflows.md (Add a configuration key).
Add/update the operation definition in OperationCatalog / AgentToolsOperationCatalog.
Implement/update the handler in modules/app-services/.../registry/operations/handlers/.
Confirm AgentToolEmitter projects the intended model-visible wire name + schema.
Add safety/approval metadata at the operation layer.
Update docs/explanation/22-agent-system-architecture.md.
Verify: ./gradlew.bat :modules:app-agent:test :modules:app-services:test
Full reference: docs/reference/contributing/common-workflows.md (Add an agent tool).
